meaning: adj.无答复的,反应迟钝的,感受性迟钝的,无同情心的
examples: Mary arrived at the hospital to find her grandmother very weak and unresponsive.
I found her in a coma, totally unresponsive.
He was totally unresponsive to the needs of the majority of the population.
The pair have not been completely unresponsive to the big drops in value though.
Further, Congress is not wholly unresponsive to public preferences regarding intervention in humanitarian emergencies.
